name: Lisa Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to the temperature specified on the Pizza Crust package.
2. Assemble the pizza using the above ingredients.
3. Place the assembled pizza on a baking stone.
4. Cook for the time indicated on the pizza crust packaging.
5. The resulting pizza should be crispy on the outside and soft on the inside.
The Chef's Comments:
"I finally used the baking stone I purchased last year. On my way home from work, I picked up some easy-to-prepare ingredients and quickly assembled a delicious pizza that even Neil thought was store-bought." - Lisa
